title: A Night at the Louvre: Leonardo da Vinci
original_title: Une nuit au Louvre: Léonard de Vinci
overview: A guided tour through the corridors of the Louvre to closely contemplate the works of Leonardo in the company of the curators of the exhibition, Vincent Delieuvin and Louis Frank.
